title: phyllanthus niruri subsp. lathyroides
intro: Phyllanthus niruri subsp. lathyroides, also known as Chanca piedra, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family and is native to the Americas and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been shown to have potential benefits in treating kidney stones, gallstones, and other gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Chanca piedra include reducing the risk of kidney stone formation, improving liver function, and alleviating symptoms of digestive disorders. Chanca piedra can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
